title: Running simulation with Icarus remains hanging

features.name: combinational feedback via generate-loop module instantiation
features.description: Code should include a generate-for loop that instantiates modules where an output port directly feeds back to an input through a shared logic vector, creating a combinational loop

features.name: x_value_propagation_in_carry_chain_via_generate
features.description: Code should include a generate-for loop where a bit-slice reference (cin[25]) is used as a literal constant input, causing X-value propagation through a ripple carry chain
features.snippet: fulladder ad(cin[i], carryin, cin[25], cin[i+1], sum[i]);
